search_queries_used: site:mohap.gov.ae Practical Guideline Management Tobacco Dependence 2024
rejection_reasons: Commercial programmes were not accepted as authoritative clinical guidance.
Patient calculators do not support clinician documentation.
Medicine names and doses were outside scope.
A quit plan must remain clinician- and patient-documented rather than generated automatically.
population_applicability: Direct for people using tobacco or seeking cessation support, with product, dependence, readiness, prior-attempt, barrier, and follow-up details remaining individual and clinician-led.
setting_applicability: Direct for UAE clinical and public-health tobacco identification, assessment, cessation support, referral, and follow-up documentation.
UAE_applicability: Verified through the current UAE Ministry of Health and Prevention practical guideline.
recency_verification: The official MoHAP 2024 practical guideline and its exact assessment and support sections were reviewed on 2026-07-13.
superseded_check: No newer official MoHAP tobacco-dependence guideline was identified.

evidence_items.direct_relationship: Supports tobacco-cessation identity and matching terminology in a UAE healthcare-provider documentation context.
evidence_items.paraphrased_evidence_summary: Supports healthcare-provider use, tobacco-status identification and documentation, cessation support, and second-hand-smoke exposure context.

evidence_items.direct_relationship: Supports current tobacco status, smoking rate, readiness, prior attempts, motivation, triggers or barriers, and reviewed-history fields.
evidence_items.paraphrased_evidence_summary: Supports current and former tobacco status, product use, willingness and readiness to quit, previous attempts, motivation, confidence, barriers, and dependence assessment including smoking rate and time to first cigarette.

evidence_items.direct_relationship: Supports clinician-documented counselling, quit-plan discussion, cessation-support referral, and arranged follow-up without medicine names or doses.
evidence_items.paraphrased_evidence_summary: Supports clinician-documented counselling, support, pharmacotherapy discussion, referral, and arranged follow-up without mapping medicine names or doses.

unresolved_source_gaps: Chest pain, breathlessness, wheeze, weight loss, physical examination, fixed one-to-three-month timing, and broad duration presets remain unsupported.
The workflow must not add medicine names, doses, a quit date, referral, or follow-up that the clinician did not document.
Qualified clinician review has not been completed.
